name: Dark Minimal UI
tagline: Dark pitch deck with wireframe windows, cyan UI outlines, monospace headings, and compact product-flow layouts.

palette.description: black canvas with charcoal UI panels, cyan wireframe lines, and compact interface accents

typography.style: monospace product display with clean UI body text

best_for: Technology pitches, UI product demos, founder decks, and concepts that should feel like an interactive interface mockup.
avoid_for: Warm storytelling, luxury editorial work, or formal reports that need traditional authority.

source_inspiration.name: Slidesgo Dark Minimal UI Pitch Deck
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS interpretation based on public visual reference; not a pixel copy and does not reuse source assets.
